prompt: Create a 16:9 horizontal cover image for a WeChat Official Account article titled "单身财务人过年生存指南" (Single Financial Person's Spring Festival Survival Guide). STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects). Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean. Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs. Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows. NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. CONTENT: Title (top, extra large): 单身财务人过年生存指南. Subtitle (below title, small): 0干货 纯娱乐 抬杠更专业. Main body (6 large modules from left to right, rounded rectangles connected by bold arrows, each module only 1 line title): Module 1: 催婚篇, Module 2: 对象条件, Module 3: 催生娃, Module 4: 催二胎, Module 5: 催买房, Module 6: 终极拷问. Bottom (optional): Two parallel large cards (each card only 1 line) - Left card: 专业抬杠 快乐过年, Right card: 资产负债平衡 现金流充裕. ICONS/METAPHORS: Financial worker形象 (worker with Excel), Red packet / Spring Festival elements, Financial statement decorative elements. HARD CONSTRAINTS: Chinese text must be clear and readable, NO extra text beyond what is specified, Sufficient whitespace, good alignment, clear arrows, Icons/illustrations should be large, use elements instead of explanatory text.

Create a 16:9 horizontal infographic comparing two perspectives on marriage pressure. TITLE: 催婚？我是待摊费用. Subtitle: 不用急着摊销. Left card (Mom's perspective): Card title: 妈的视角, Text: 30岁了！像你这么大时，你都上小学了. Right card (My perspective): Card title: 我的视角, Text: 单身是"待摊费用"，不是"管理费用"，不用急着摊销. Bottom conclusion: 审慎性原则：不急. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Left: Anxious mom figure, Right: Calm financial worker with Excel, Center: VS comparison symbol. LAYOUT: Two equal-width cards side by side with separator/comparison symbol, strictly aligned.

Create a 16:9 horizontal infographic showing financial risks of marriage. TITLE: 婚姻的财务风险分析. Subtitle: 为什么要持币观望. Main body (4 risk points, each 1 line): Risk 1: 商誉减值风险（合并后可能三观不合）, Risk 2: 隐性债务（对方财务状况不明）, Risk 3: 管理成本上升（协同效应不确定）, Risk 4: 退出成本高（清算成本高）. Bottom conclusion: 当前不建议进行长期股权投资，继续持有可供出售金融资产. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Checklist/test paper elements, Warning/risk icons, Financial statement decorative elements. LAYOUT: Clear list format with icons for each risk point.

Create a 16:9 horizontal infographic comparing ideal vs reality marriage accounting entries. TITLE: 理想VS现实：婚姻会计分录. Subtitle: 对方要是优质资产. Left card (Ideal): Card title: 理想情况, Text line 1: 借：长期股权投资——配偶 1, Text line 2: 贷：灵魂资本 1. Right card (Reality): Card title: 现实情况, Text line 1: 借：长期股权投资——配偶 1, Text line 2: 贷：银行存款（彩礼）+ 应付账款（房贷）+ 长期借款（车贷）. Bottom conclusion: 婚前要做尽职调查. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Left: Pink heart / romantic elements, Right: Money bag / bill elements, Accounting entry table style. LAYOUT: Two equal-width cards side by side with separator, strictly aligned.

Create a 16:9 horizontal infographic showing baby investment return analysis. TITLE: 生娃投资回报率分析. Subtitle: IRR = -100%. Main body data: 初始投资：预计负债——抚养费 100万, 年化投入：教育+医疗+日常 = 6-9万/年, 回收期：乐观22年 / 悲观无限期, 内部收益率：传统模型 -100% / 情感模型 +∞. Bottom conclusion: 战略性亏损业务，有情怀再投. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Baby elements, Downward chart/curve, Money bag flowing out, Investment symbols. LAYOUT: Clear data presentation with visual hierarchy.

Create a 16:9 horizontal three-card insight infographic about second child economies of scale. TITLE: 二胎：规模经济？. Subtitle: 管理成本超载. Card 1 (Theory): Text: 产量翻倍，成本不翻倍, Keyword: 理论存在规模效应. Card 2 (Reality): Text: 精力消耗120% / 婆媳矛盾+50% / 夫妻吵架+100%, Keyword: 管理成本超载. Card 3 (Capacity): Text: 产能不足，谁出钱/谁出力/谁带娃？, Keyword: 规模不经济. Bottom conclusion: 暂不考虑扩大生产规模. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Card 1: Factory/production line elements, Card 2: Overload dashboard/warning symbols, Card 3: Question marks/question cloud, Bottom: Stop symbol. LAYOUT: Three equal-width cards side by side, color-coded, strictly aligned.

Create a 16:9 horizontal two-card comparison infographic for buying vs renting. TITLE: 买房VS租房：现金流折现. Subtitle: 30年账算给你看. Left card (Renting): Card title: 租房方案, Text line 1: 30年租金：108万, Text line 2: 100万首付理财赚120万，净赚12万. Right card (Buying): Card title: 买房方案, Text line 1: 首付+月供：总成本450万+, Text line 2: 但有无价居住效用（落户/上学/结婚）. Bottom conclusion: 财务角度租房划算 / 人生角度看效用函数. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Left: Key/rental symbols, Right: House/mortgage symbols, Center: Balance scale/VS symbol. LAYOUT: Two equal-width cards side by side with separator, strictly aligned.

Create a 16:9 horizontal infographic about year-end bonus tax trap. TITLE: 年终奖陷阱. Subtitle: 多发1块钱，少拿2310元. Scenario A: 年终奖：36000元, 个税：1080元（3%税率）, 到手：34920元. Scenario B: 年终奖：36001元（多1块）, 个税：3390元（10%税率）, 到手：32610元. Bottom conclusion: 少发1块钱，多拿2310元. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Money bag/red packet elements, Downward comparison arrow, Warning/trap symbols, Calculator elements. LAYOUT: Clear side-by-side comparison with visual hierarchy.

Create a 16:9 horizontal infographic showing life balance sheet. TITLE: 人生资产负债表. Subtitle: 我图什么？. Assets (资产): 流动资产：工资、存款、理财, 固定资产：健康、技能、证书, 无形资产：知识、经验、人脉. Liabilities (负债): 流动负债：房租、生活费, 长期负债：养老准备、医疗准备. Owner's Equity (所有者权益): 净资产 = 资产 - 负债. Bottom conclusion (2 lines): 不追求资产规模最大，追求净资产质量最优, 健康、自由、持续经营. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Financial statement format, Balance scale symbols, Health/heart elements, Going concern symbols. LAYOUT: Balance sheet three-section format (Assets / Liabilities / Equity).

Create a 16:9 horizontal two-card comparison infographic about job explanation. TITLE: 你是干啥的？. Subtitle: 审计 ≠ 会计. Left card (Others' understanding): Card title: 王大爷理解版, Text: 哦！就是管钱的！. Right card (My explanation): Text line 1: 会计是做菜的, Text line 2: 审计是品尝菜有没有问题的. Bottom conclusion: 我只能尝，不能做. ICONS: Left: Money bag/abacus, Right: Magnifying glass/checklist, Spoon/plate elements (cooking vs tasting metaphor). LAYOUT: Two equal-width cards side by side with separator, strictly aligned.

Create a 16:9 horizontal infographic with universal response formulas for Spring Festival questions. TITLE: 万能回复公式. Subtitle: 一键复制，专业抬杠. Six scenario responses: 催婚：当前市场环境不明朗，建议持币观望, 催生：该项目风险高、回收期长，建议审慎投资, 催二胎：产能不足，存在规模不经济, 催买房：当前资产负债率过高，不宜再融资, 问工资：商业机密，不对外披露, 走账：职业操守问题，建议走正规渠道. Bottom blessing (2 lines): 资产负债平衡, 现金流充裕. STYLE: Cream-colored paper base (visible paper grain), colored pencil line art (visible pencil strokes) + light watercolor wash (soft wash effects), Warm tones, light doodle decorations, fun but clean, Chinese text must be clear and readable, no garbled text; large font size; few words and short sentences; avoid dense small text/paragraphs, Sufficient whitespace, clear hierarchy, aligned cards, clear arrows, NO flat vector poster style, NO 3D, NO photorealism, NO complex backgrounds/strong gradient effects, NO extra small text notes/watermarks/signatures, NO English or random characters. ICONS: Checklist/table elements, Copy button symbols, Spring Festival decorative elements, Financial statement decorative elements. LAYOUT: Clear list format with each scenario clearly separated.
